violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food * (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Containers of cooked beef and sauces in the upright cooler were not dated.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Boxes of napkins and 8oz containers were stored on the floor in the stockroom.--Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Paper boats on top of the prep cooler and to go containers under the oven were not inverted.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. Paper towels were not available for the hand sink in the kitchen.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Containers of deli meat and chicken in the prep cooler were not marked with a date they were removed from the package.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. Clean dishes were placed ont cloth towels in the dish area.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. Paper towels were sitting on the counter by the pizza oven. These must be self dispensing.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Wall above the prep cooler and microwave needs to be cleaned.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
